title: Diffusion Models Path
description: Build fluency in Diffusion Models inside Generative Models by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Audio Diffusion Model
steps.summary: Audio Diffusion Model belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Diffusion Models. It sits inside Generative Models / Diffusion Models. Start after Diffusion and Diffusion Model.
steps.whyIncluded: Establish the core vocabulary for Diffusion Models. Start here to anchor your understanding of this area.

steps.title: DDPM
steps.summary: DDPM belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Diffusion Models. It sits inside Generative Models / Diffusion Models. Compare it with Improved DDPM and Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPM). It opens into Improved DDPM and Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM).
steps.whyIncluded: A specialized concept in Diffusion Models. Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms are solid.
